DATA.description: Web Developer – Front-End Specialization, Full-Stack skills
DATA.summary: I started my development journey creating scripts and interfaces for FiveM servers, where I spent over 3 years honing my skills in UI, logic, and problem-solving. This experience sparked my passion for coding and naturally led me to the world of web development. Today, I'm passionate about front-end development, with a particular interest in creating modern and high-performing landing pages. I enjoy transforming ideas into clear and attractive interfaces using technologies like React. My goal: to create web pages that capture attention, convert, and provide a great user experience. I'm always eager to learn new things and improve my skills. Don't hesitate to contact me if you're interested in collaborating!
